final_answer:
It is a Codex tool/session failure, not a Gold Chain code error.

It means I tried to send input to a terminal session that had already closed, and later Codex also failed to save rollout messages because the thread record was missing. That is infrastructure/control-plane failure in the agent runtime.

Why it matters: any result after that point cannot be trusted unless re-checked from the machine state.

Next: I need to re-check the running local chain processes, logs, and latest heights before making any claim about what passed or failed.
